label: Color
description: Defines a named color entry used by carpets, paints, hair, ideologies, weapons, and planning overlays.

color.label: Color
color.description: The RGBA color value. Accepts integer (0–255) or float (0–1) components as (r, g, b) or (r, g, b, a).

colorType.label: Color type
colorType.description: Category that controls where this color is offered in the UI.

displayOrder.label: Display order
displayOrder.description: Sort order within the color picker UI. Lower values appear first. Defaults to int.MaxValue (sort last).

displayInStylingStationUI.label: Display in styling station UI
displayInStylingStationUI.description: Whether this color appears as a player-selectable option in the styling station. Set to false for neutral infrastructure colors such as black and white.

randomlyPickable.label: Randomly pickable
randomlyPickable.description: Whether the game may randomly assign this color. Set to false for fixed-association colors such as unique weapon traits.
